title: Stranger Things
description: A group of kids uncover supernatural mysteries in their small town after a boy mysteriously disappears.

title: Money Heist
description: A criminal mastermind known as The Professor plans the biggest heist in history.

title: Dark
description: A time-travel mystery unfolds when children start disappearing in a German town.

title: The Witcher
description: Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter, struggles to find his place in a world of magic and political intrigue.

title: Wednesday
description: Wednesday Addams investigates a murder mystery at Nevermore Academy.

title: Squid Game
description: Hundreds of players compete in deadly childhood games for a massive cash prize.
